title: 1st Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Ends Run After 266 Days in Japanese Theaters
content: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle - Akaza Sairai , the first film in the Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle trilogy , ended its run in Japanese theaters on Thursday after screening for 266 days.
author: ANN

title: Dark Machine The Animation Series Reveals More Cast
content: The staff for Dark Machine the Animation , the original anime for the Dark Machine game and anime project , revealed four more cast members for the anime on Friday. Kazuyuki Okitsu as Myōjin Ryōta Suzuki as Ryō Genta Nakamura as Kinji Additionally, Sōhei Horikane will voice Hiru.
author: ANN

title: WIT Studio Apologizes for Using Generative AI in Opening Sequence of Ascendance of a Bookworm Part 3 Anime
content: The company will be redrawing the background art for the cuts that used generative AI, and will replace the opening sequence with a "completed version" starting with the second episode.
author: ANN

title: Date a Live F Last Date Anime Project Announced
content: The Date A Live franchise is getting a new anime project titled Date A Live F Last Date. While the project’s announcement released a teaser video and visual, it did not share the anime’s premiere date or format. Juni Nishimura, who recently directed the Mechanical Marie anime, will direct Date A Live F Last Dance.
author: Anime Corner

title: Additional Cast for 'Dark Machine: The Animation' Announced
content: The official X (formerly Twitter) of the Dark Machine television anime announced additional cast on Friday. The anime is scheduled to premiere on Fuji TV in 2026. Cast Myojin: Kazuyuki Okitsu ( Dr.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Netflix Delays Live-Action 'Viral Hit' Series by 2 Weeks to June 11
content: Netflix confirmed on Friday that its upcoming live-action Japanese series Viral Hit has been rescheduled to June 11, which is two weeks later than its original May 28 release date. Newly released still cuts showcase protagonist Shimura Kota, played by Ōji Suzuka , throwing punches and shouting in intense scenes.
author: ANN

title: New Date A Live Anime Unveils Title, Staff, Returning Cast
content: Kadokawa announced on Friday that the new anime project for the Date A Live franchise is titled Date A Live F Last Date . Kadokawa unveiled the anime's visual, staff, and returning cast, but did not reveal the format's format or release date.
author: ANN

title: New 'Date A Live' Anime Project 'Date A Live F: Last Date' Announced
content: Production company Kadokawa announced a new Date A Live anime project titled Date A Live F: Last Date on Friday, revealing new staff, returning cast, a teaser visual (pictured), and teaser promo. Junji Nishimura ( Nurarihyon no Mago , Mato Seihei no Slave chief director) is helming the new anime at Fugaku .
author: MyAnimeList

title: Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End Gets a New Release After Season 2 Finale
content: The year kicked off with the exciting Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End Season 2, as it follows Frieren and her party traveling in the Northern regions. While the latest season is shorter than expected, with only 10 episodes, the story is more exciting as the journey gets more dangerous going forward.
author: ComicBook

title: Return to Shironagasu Island Game's Manga Debuts With New Artist on May 9
content: The May issue of Kodansha 's Bessatsu Shōnen Magazine announced on Thursday that the planned manga adaptation of Hyogo Onimushi and Tabinomichi's Return to Shironagasu Island game will launch in the magazine's next issue on May 9. The magazine lists Muratan as the new artist for the manga series.
author: ANN
